blueprint.title: Delta Church Door — Goosebumps Music
blueprint.scientific_note: Music engineered to trigger frisson — the neuroscience of goosebumps.
blueprint.description:
Delta Church Door is a carefully crafted piece of music designed to give you goosebumps.

Our tracks use the neuroscience of frisson — the physical sensation of chills caused by music — to create deeply emotional listening experiences.

Subscribe to the Goosebumps Channel for more frisson-engineered music.
